programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Grace (Selena Gomez) is an ordinary girl who becomes an accidental princess when a family summer trip to Paris turns into the fantasy of a lifetime. Living like royalty, Grace, along with her two best friends, discovers who she really is – by assuming another person's identity.

programme.title: North
programme.desc: Eleven-year-old North (Elijah Wood, The Lord of the Rings trilogy) realizes that his parents (Jason Alexander and Julia Louis-Dreyfus, TV's “Seinfeld”) never pay attention to him. After talking to a wise man in an Easter Bunny suit (Bruce Willis, Die Hard), North comes up with the idea of becoming a free agent. After winning a court case, North is given two months to find new parents, leading to an amazing, hilarious adventure. Featuring an all-star cast including Dan Aykroyd, Alan Arkin, Kathy Bates, Jon Lovitz, John Ritter and, in her first-ever role, Scarlett Johansson, NORTH is a comedy unlike any other.

programme.title: Hero
programme.desc: A plane carrying 54 passengers-including television reporter Gale Gayley (Geena Davis)-crash-lands right in front of small-time crook Bernie LaPlante (Dustin Hoffman). The first person on the chaotic accident scene, he spontaneously risks his life and saves a plane full of people. But keeping to his credo “keep a low profile,” Bernie disappears back into the rainy night. When Gale's TV station offers a $1 million reward for the identity of “The Angel of Flight 104,” an impostor appears-homeless drifter John Bubber (Andy Garcia), who knows the right answers because he picked up the hitchhiking Bernie and heard his story.

programme.title: Soul Men
programme.desc: Though it's been some twenty years since they have spoken with one another, two estranged soul-singing legends agree to participate in a reunion performance at the Apollo Theater to honor their recently deceased band leader.

programme.title: The Captor
programme.desc: Fact is stronger than fiction in this furiously thrilling crime caper based on the absurd but true story of the 1973 bank heist and hostage crisis, starring Ethan Hawke and Noomi Rapace and from the executive producer of BlackKkKlansman. 1973, Stockholm, Sweden: self-styled outlaw Lars Nystrom, high on pills walks into a bank, pulls out a machine gun and res into the ceiling takes two bank workers hostage and demands his friend Gunnar is released from prison, $1million, and a getaway car.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveler, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attach for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: The Monster
programme.desc: A mother and daughter must confront a terrifying monster when they break down on a deserted road.

programme.title: Rogue
programme.desc: From the director of WOLF CREEK comes this terrifying look at nature's perfect killing machine. When a group of tourists stumble into the remote Australian river territory of an enormous crocodile, the deadly creature traps them on a tiny mud island with the tide quickly rising and darkness descending. As the hungry predator closes in, they must fight for survival against all odds. Starring SAM WORTHINGTON (Terminator Salvation, Avatar) RADHA MITCHELL (Silent Hill) and MICHAEL VARTAN (Alias), Rogue delivers intense action and breathless suspense as it speeds towards the intense final showdown.

programme.title: The Hitman's Apprentice
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Adam agrees to do a day's driving for his mum's gangster boyfriend Peter, it takes him on a 24-hour journey into a nightmarish world of murder, sex trafficking and revenge, in the company of aging hit man Roy.

programme.title: Tornado Warning
programme.desc: Aliens attack Earth, using deadly electrical tornadoes as weapons. A farmer, his brilliant high school daughter, and a tornado blogger race against the clock to find a way to thwart the horrific invasion.

programme.title: Dangerous Mind Of A Hooligan
programme.desc: When the mastermind behind a bank robbery is shot dead on the job - four thieves find themselves caught in a heist which quickly goes wrong. With a hostage in tow and bags of money, the police quickly close in.

programme.title: Cash
programme.desc: A stroke of good luck turns lethal for Sam Phelan and his wife Leslie when they are faced with a life-changing decision that brings strange and sinister Pyke Kubic to their doorstep.

programme.title: Outlawed
programme.desc: An action packed story of corruption and murder. Outnumbered, outgunned and against all odds, a Commando fights his way through a siege to save his girl.

programme.title: Smother
programme.desc: After being fired from his job, an everyday guy faces pressure from his wife about having a baby, while having to deal with his suffocating mother, who has decided to move in with the couple.

programme.title: The Assassin Next Door
programme.desc: A woman forced to work as an assassin for the Russian mafia agrees to help her neighbor kill her abusive husband.

programme.title: Samba
programme.desc: Samba came to France 10 years ago from Senegal. He plugs away at various lowly jobs but soon meets Alice

programme.title: Kon-Tiki
programme.desc: Legendary explorer Thor Heyerdahl's epic 4,300-mile crossing of the Pacific on a balsawood raft in 1947, in an effort to prove that it was possible for South Americans to settle in Polynesia in pre-Columbian times.

programme.title: Heaven Is Waiting
programme.desc: It has been years since Ned Stevens, a charming self-made success, lost his wife Kate to cancer. Yet he still can't let go of her memory and move forward with his life.. But when Liz brings home a new boyfriend from college -- Ned finds that his comfortable world is turned upside down as Liz tries to divert his attention to Carol, an attractive single woman who lives in Ned's neighborhood.

programme.title: Love In Aruba
programme.desc: A lonely teacher (Amber) is hired by Connor, the single father of a struggling student. She is to tutor his daughter Macey (age 10) over a summer while they travel for his work. As Amber helps Macey, she sees glimpses of what's missing in the family's life. Their grand destinations are filled with rich items and potential rewarding business deals, but it's missing heart. Amber's influence fills the void and brings Macey and Connor together. With it, Amber starts to fall in love with Connor, but can he see her as anything beyond the hired help?

programme.title: When We Last Spoke
programme.desc: In 1967, two sisters are abandoned and raised by grandparents in the town of Fireside. Humor, heartbreak, and triumph are served with whipped cream and lots of local nuts in this heartwarming tale of family, friendship, and forgiveness.

programme.title: Farm To Fork To Love
programme.desc: A young and talented chef, ALICE (Meggan Kaiser), works as a sous chef at one of the top restaurants in New York. After a disastrous night serving a food critic, she receives an invitation to judge a food competition in honor of the prestigious annual fundraiser for the St. Andrew's Children's Hospital. Alice accepts the invitation despite the dismay of BRETT, her boss who is also her boyfriend. Once she gets to Kansas, Alice is surprised to find her former boyfriend in college, CHRISTIAN (Scot cooper), is amongst the judges. The cooking show and her reconnection with Christian will make Alice reconsider her calling and make her dreams come true.

programme.title: Two Brothers in Trinity
programme.desc: After inheriting a land plot in a dusty place called Trinity, the antagonistic half-brothers, Lester and Jesse, reunite to pursue different aspirations, only to find themselves neck-deep in trouble. Will they ever fulfil their dreams?

programme.title: The Plunderers
programme.desc: Cavalry officer John Drum attempts to track down outlaw Whit Lacey, but finds he must join forces with Lacey to fight a Sioux war party.

programme.title: Gunman of One Hundred Crosses
programme.desc: An Irishman is killed in the wild West. His son Jimmy goes out searching for the killers of his father, but is soon ambushed by two highwaymen, and killed, too.

programme.title: The Red Pony
programme.desc: A ranch boy is gifted with a colt, grows to love him but the colt escapes, with tragic results.

programme.title: A Rainy Day In New York
programme.desc: Woody Allen returns to the romantic fields of previous hits Vicky Cristina Barcelona and Midnight in Paris.

programme.title: 30 Days until Im Famous
programme.desc: A Latina working in Los Angeles as a messenger is randomly discovered and fashioned into a pop music star.

programme.title: Accidentally Engaged
programme.desc: Famous actor Chas Hunter and aspiring actress Clarissa Byers agree to fake an engagement to improve both their reputations. However, playing pretend starts to feel all too real as the two start to fall for one another.

programme.title: Law of Attraction
programme.desc: A young female attorney with ambition to make partner in her law firm, falls for an opposing attorney on a big important case. Will love prevail?

programme.title: A Random Encounter
programme.desc: What seems to be a chance encounter one day at a coffee shop leads to a full-fledged romance, but the couple must fight for their relationship to survive the craziness that is show business. Starring: Meghan Markle, Sean Young, Michael Rady

programme.title: A Random Encounter
programme.desc: This whirlwind rom-com proves that finding Prince Charming can be a right royal pain. Sassy Mindy is well and truly immersed in the superficial dating scene, while her best friend Laura is a hopeless romantic. So when she has a chance moment with a stranger in a coffee shop, she is left wondering whether this could blossom into a lifelong romance?

programme.title: Venus
programme.desc: A family comedy about a transitioning woman who discovers that she's the father of a 14 year old boy.

programme.title: The New Girlfriend
programme.desc: A young woman makes a surprising discovery about the husband of her late best friend. Based on the novel by Ruth Rendell.

programme.title: Love at Sunset Terrace
programme.desc: Tired of her fast-paced life in the city, Sophie Carter travels to a small seaside town to disconnect and self-reflect, staying at an Airbnb run by a widowed father of a young girl. With a little nudging from the matchmaking daughter, Sophie and Michael unexpectedly start to fall in love and Sophie must decide between returning home or following her heart.

programme.title: The Gold Rush
programme.desc: A prospector goes to the Klondike in search of gold and finds it and more.

programme.title: The Idiot
programme.desc: A Japanese veteran, driven partially mad from the war, travels to the snowy island of Kameda where he soon enters a love triangle with his best friend and a disgraced woman.

programme.title: The Immigrant
programme.desc: Charlie is an immigrant who endures a challenging voyage and gets into trouble as soon as he arrives in America.

programme.title: The Killing Jar
programme.desc: Seven people are passing time late one evening at a roadside diner in the middle of nowhere. When a radio reports the disturbing murder of a family in a nearby county, the patrons immediately suspect new arrival, Doe (MICHAEL MADSEN) as the killer. Armed with a shotgun Doe takes the seven hostage, but as the body count rises the desperate survivors discover that one of the hostages may be even more dangerous than their captor.

programme.title: The Last Man on Earth
programme.desc: When a disease turns all of humanity into the living dead, the last man on earth becomes a reluctant vampire hunter.

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: Nobel Son
programme.desc: On the eve of Barkley Michaelson's father receiving the Nobel Prize, Barkley is kidnapped and the requested ransom is the $2,000,000 in Nobel Prize money.

programme.title: Miss Meadows
programme.desc: Schoolteacher Miss Meadows is not entirely what she appears. Well-mannered, sweet, and caring but underneath the candy-sweet exterior hides the soul of a vigilante, taking it upon herself to right the wrongs in this world by whatever means necessary.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: Invasion Planet Earth
programme.desc: After the death of his young daughter, Tom Dunn is a broken man. When his wife falls pregnant again, he cannot believe their luck. However, his joy is short-lived, as, on the very same day, the people of Earth become plagued with terrifying visions of the end of the world. When a gigantic, all-consuming alien mothership appears in the sky and launches a ruthless attack on Earth's cities, chaos and destruction follow. Tom must find the strength and wisdom to save his wife and unborn child. However, first he must confront a shocking truth. A truth which threatens the key to the survival of the human race. The ultimate war for Planet Earth is about to begin...

programme.title: Parallel
programme.desc: A group of friends stumble upon a mirror that serves as a portal to a "multiverse", but soon discover that importing knowledge from the other side in order to better their lives brings increasingly dangerous consequences.

programme.title: Occupation Rainfall
programme.desc: From the VFX team behind The Last Jedi and Blade Runner 2049, Occupation Rainfall is a sci-fi action epic with an all star cast including Harry Potter's Jason Isaacs, The Mandalorian's Temuera Morrison and The Hangover's Ken Jeong. After an intergalactic invasion of Earth, where survivors are fighting back in a desperate ground war, the resistance uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decisive end for mankind. With the alien invaders hell-bent on making Earth their new home, the race is on to save the planet. Occupation Rainfall Is an explosive sci-fi extravaganza that grips from start to thrilling finish.

programme.title: Eternity
programme.desc: Detective Richard Manning (played by Elliot Travers) is transported into a virtual-reality computer game and tasked with solving a seemingly implausible murder. The more Richard investigates, the more complex the case seems to become. He soon realizes his own future and survival depend on him solving everything - and quickly.

programme.title: Hometown Hero
programme.desc: Young divorce lawyer Kelsey finds it safer to keep love out of her life - that is until a stray dog pairs her with Harrison, the local vet.

programme.title: Once Upon a Date
programme.desc: When top-notched real estate broker, Josh Donahue, is sent to buyout a community playhouse he unexpectedly falls for the owner forcing him to decide between the family business and true love.

programme.title: Forever Love
programme.desc: A couple's lost love goes full circle between the 50's and the present.

programme.title: Stolen Dreams
programme.desc: Laura Paddington is overcome with joy when her daughter, Zoe, returns to her after being abducted 17 years before--but is Zoe really her long lost child?

programme.title: Meet Me in New York
programme.desc: Kelly is a young, creative, ambitious events planner in New York City and quickly gaining a reputation as one of the best in the business. But when Joe, a stubborn, difficult, but influential website editor, hires her to organize his niece's 10th birthday party, Kelly quickly realizes that she may have just met her match.

programme.title: Very Good Girls
programme.desc: EXCLUSIVELY AVAILABLE ON DIGITAL PLATFORMS. Best friends Lily (Dakota Fanning) and Gerry (Elizabeth Olsen), home for one last New York summer, make a pact to lose their virginity before leaving for college. But when they both fall for the same handsome artist (Boyd Holbrook) and Lily starts seeing him in secret, a lifelong friendship is tested.

programme.title: Top End Wedding
programme.desc: Top End Wedding is a feel-good road trip comedy from the producers of The Sapphires. Engaged and in love Lauren and Ned have just 10 days until their dream wedding in the remote far north of Australia. But there's only one issue... Lauren's mother has gone AWOL! The couple embarks on a fantastic road trip to find her. But will they find her in time and will their love resist the ultimate test?

programme.title: Pretenders
programme.desc: Life imitates deadly art as French New Wave obsessed film student Terry (Jack Kilmer, The Nice Guys) and his best friend, the smooth talking Phil (Shameik Moore, Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse) are both seduced by mysterious actress Catherine (Jane Levy, Evil Dead ). The longer they know each other, the more they realise they don't truly know the real Catherine. After years of sex, betrayal, and collateral damage, the three careen into a lifestyle that leaves one of them fighting for their life.

programme.title: Megan Leavey
programme.desc: A young Marine corporal's unique bond with her combat dog saves many lives during their deployment in Iraq.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: When his brother goes missing, Tommy, the family's black-sheep, cares for his sister-in-law and nieces.

programme.title: The Glass Castle
programme.desc: THE GLASS CASTLE chronicles the adventures of an eccentric, resilient, tight-knit family.

programme.title: Brothers
programme.desc: When his brother goes missing, Tommy, the family's black-sheep, cares for his sister-in-law and nieces.

programme.title: We Were Soldiers
programme.desc: Starring Oscar Winner Mel Gibson and from the team behind Hacksaw Ridge and Pearl Harbor. In 1965, 400 American troops faced an ambush by 2,000 enemy troops in the Ia Drang Valley (also known as the Valley of Death), in one of the most gruesome fights of the Vietnam War. We Were Soldiers is a powerful, moving and lasting tribute to the heart-breaking sacrifices of those fallen soldiers.

programme.title: Air Force One is Down: Air Force One is Down
programme.desc: [EPISODE 1/2] Alistair Maclean's highly charged novel is brought to life in this tense, international thriller. When a fearless Serbian General is captured and imprisoned for war crimes, his loyal soldiers hijack Air Force One, kidnap the President of the United Stated and demand the release of their General. A hair-raising, high-altitude, wall-to-wall action-adventure.

programme.title: Air Force One is Down: Air Force One is Down
programme.desc: [EPISODE 2/2] Alistair Maclean's highly charged novel is brought to life in this tense, international thriller. When a fearless Serbian General is captured and imprisoned for war crimes, his loyal soldiers hijack Air Force One, kidnap the President of the United Stated and demand the release of their General. A hair-raising, high-altitude, wall-to-wall action-adventure.

programme.title: The Void
programme.desc: Enter this blood-soaked nightmare at your own risk. When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital. Now Carter must lead the survivors on a hellish voyage in a bid to survive! Totally mind-bending!

programme.title: Wrong Turn
programme.desc: A nightmare befalls a group of friends on the Appalachian trail in this iconic franchise reboot from the original creator Alan. B. McElroy. While on a dream trip, a group finds themselves at the mercy of an urban legend - The Foundation. As a freak accident drives the group deeper into the mountains, they find themselves succumbing one by one in a gruesome game of survival.

programme.title: The Gourmet Detective
programme.desc: After a shocking murder at his friend's restaurant, a culinary expert uses his mastery of food, drink and cooking to solve the case. Stars Dylan Neal, Brooke Burns (2015)

programme.title: Seraphim Falls
programme.desc: At the end of the Civil War, a colonel hunts down a man with whom he had a grudge. Starring Liam Neeson and Pierce Brosnan (2006).

programme.title: Reprisal
programme.desc: Haunted by a fatal heist that left his colleague dead, a bank manager teams up with an ex-cop to bring down the ruthless criminal responsible. Stars Bruce Willis, Frank Grillo, Olivia Culpo (2018)

programme.title: Drive
programme.desc: Stuntman by day, getaway driver by night, the mysterious Driver must put his skills to the test when he chooses to help his neighbour and her shady husband. Stars Ryan Gosling (2011)

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: A true story that spans over four decades between Jan and young G.I Steve, navigating family, faith, and love. You will be in for a roller-coaster of emotions. (2019)

programme.title: Our Take on Love
programme.desc: Designer Isabella and filmmaker Blake are both hired to work at the Godfrey Manor Gala. Will the romantic location and the love stories they uncover change their perception of love for the better?

programme.title: The Wedding Fix
programme.desc: Recently single Gwen helps to plan her best friend's wedding. But finalising the final details are complicated when she is teamed-up with laid back best man, Josh. Stars Andrea Brooks. (2021)

programme.title: Love's Sweet Recipe
programme.desc: Courtney is a talented chef who has taken over the running of the family restaurant. But is her renewed zest for life and her newfound passion for cooking linked to Jake returning home? (2021)

programme.title: Sunrise in Heaven [aka Forever Love]
programme.desc: A true story that spans over four decades between Jan and young G.I Steve, navigating family, faith, and love. You will be in for a roller-coaster of emotions. (2019)

programme.title: The Crossing
programme.desc: Based on the historical novel by Howard Fast, THE CROSSING stars Jeff Daniels as George Washington, the revolutionary war general who leads American colonialists in the war against British rule. This telefilm dramatizes Washington's crossing of the Delaware River in 1776, prior to his eventual election as the first president of the United States.

programme.title: The Confirmation
programme.desc: A divorced father and his eight-year-old son, spend a rather predictable weekend together, but when a valuable toolbox gets stolen, the search for the thieves will turn into a true family bonding.

programme.title: Daredevil
programme.desc: A lawyer blinded by radioactive waste fights crime as an acrobatic martial arts superhero, using his other senses, which have been enhanced.

programme.title: Dark Tide
programme.desc: Halle Berry plays a traumatised shark expert who returns to deep waters after an almost fatal encounter with a great white shark. Battling her fears, she leads a thrill-seeking businessman on a dive into the dangerous "Shark Alley". Will she survive the world's deadliest feeding ground? Brought to you by the director of Blue Crush, this edge-of-your-seat shark movie is highly recommended!

programme.title: Enough
programme.desc: An abused wife on the run from her violent husband finally decides she's had enough.

programme.title: Mindhunters
programme.desc: Trainees in the FBI's psychological profiling program must put their training into practice when they discover a killer in their midst.

programme.title: 7 Seconds
programme.desc: When an experienced thief accidentally makes off with a Van Gogh, his partner is kidnapped by gangsters in pursuit of the painting, forcing the criminal to hatch a rescue plan.

programme.title: Hudson Hawk
programme.desc: A former cat burglar is forced to steal Da Vinci artworks in a plot for world domination.

programme.title: Year One
programme.desc: When a couple of lazy hunter-gatherers (Black and Cera) are banished from their primitive village, they set off on an epic journey through the ancient world.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A 15-year-old music fan and fledgling journalist goes on the road with a popular rock band in the anything-goes 1970's.

programme.title: Punchline
programme.desc: Stand-up comedy hopefuls toil in obscurity at a New York club while waiting for their big break.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: The Match
programme.desc: "The Match" tells the story of the true events which transpired in the spring of 1944 when Nazis organized a football match between the Hungarian prisoners and an elite Nazi team to commemorate Adolf Hitler's birthday.

programme.title: Feed
programme.desc: Olivia and Matthew Grey, 18-year-old twins born into a world of privilege and high expectations. There are almost no boundaries between them even their dreams are connected.

programme.title: The Last Act
programme.desc: Oscar® winning director, Barry Levinson directs Oscar® winning actor Al Pacino and Greta Gerwig in THE LAST ACT from the screenplay by Buck Henry and Michal Zebede based on the novel The Humbling by Philip Roth. Simon Axler is a famed stage actor who becomes depressed and then suicidal when he suddenly and inexplicably loses his gift. In an attempt to get his mojo back, he has an affair with a lesbian woman half his age. Before long, the relationship causes chaos as people from the romantic duo's pasts resurface in their lives.

programme.title: Kill Your Darlings
programme.desc: A murder in 1944 draws together the great poets of the beat generation: Allen Ginsberg, Jack Kerouac and William Burroughs.

programme.title: The Champion of Auschwitz
programme.desc: The incredible true story of the Polish pre-war boxing champion Tadeusz "Teddy" Pietrzykowski, who, early in the Second World War, arrived with the very first transport of prisoners to the newly created Auschwitz-Birkenau concentration camp, where he became known as 'The Champion of Auschwitz'.

programme.title: Warriors' Gate
programme.desc: American teenager Jack Bronson is magically transported to ancient China, where he must become a hero and rescue a beautiful princess from the clutches of the evil barbarian king.

programme.title: The Three Musketeers
programme.desc: France is in turmoil and a new, naive King finds himself manipulated by the evil Cardinal Richelieu (James Cosmo, Tom Clancy's Jack Ryan). With a corrupt commander of the royal guard by his side the Cardinal employs the expertise of the devious and wicked Milady de Winter in a plot to bring down the monarchy and drag the country into war. As France burns the Cardinal will take control. All that stands between them and victory are the remnants of an elite group who wore loyalty to crown and country.

programme.title: The Bombing
programme.desc: Inspired by the heroic, untold true story of Chongqing. Starring legends Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Adrien Brody (The Pianist), this pulse-pounding war epic centres around the courage of China's citizens during WWII. As U.S. Air Force commander Jack Johnson trains the Chinese aviators to battle Japanese fighters, a hot-headed pilot begs to fly a powerful bomber that could stop the attacks.

programme.title: Incoming
programme.desc: The International Space Station is now a prison - the ultimate black site. No one's getting out. And no one knows it's there. But when the imprisoned terrorists take over the Station and turn it into a missile aimed at Moscow, only a shuttle pilot and a rookie doctor can stop them. Their task is complicated by a rogue CIA agent who has his own plans for the station and the terrorists within.

programme.title: Cold Skin
programme.desc: At the dawn of the First World War a young man named Friend (David Oakes: The Borgias, The White Queen) arrives at a desolate Antarctic Circle island to take the post of weather observer. But on shore he finds no trace of the man whom he has been sent to replace, just a deranged castaway, Gruner (Ray Stevenson: Punisher: War Zone, Big Game), who has witnessed a horror he refuses to name… Little does Friend know that an unknown race of amphibious humanoids emerge from the seas every night to besiege him and Gruner in an unstoppable attack to their safety.

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In 'Dinosaurs Of The Deep' we accompany a team of WildOceans' scientists uncovering the mysteries behind the deep oceans. With only 32 individuals known to exist off the coast of South Africa, central to the storytelling will be the quest to discover the 33rd coelacanth.

programme.title: Marine Mammals
programme.desc: From giant sperm whales to dramatic humpbacks and playful dolphins, we can't resist the endless charms of marine mammals.

programme.title: Planet California: Rivers of Gold
programme.desc: It is a land of extremes - tallest, deepest, highest, hottest - and home to the richest concentration of biodiversity in the Americas. California sea lions pursue king salmon down the California Current and into their freshwater spawning grounds. Mountain lions stalk majestic bighorn sheep into the forbidding reaches of the Sierra Nevada and its vital snow-packs, and giant redwoods harvest precious water right out of the air. In a rapidly changing - and thirsty - world, drought, dams and fire pose dire threats to a vibrant ecosystem connected by rivers on land, in the sky and in the sea.

programme.title: Monkey Mayhem
programme.desc: Monkeys: loveable, aggressive, diverse and full of mischief. Our distant cousins have much in common with us. They're intelligent, cooperative and have complex relationships. They're some of the most evolutionary successful species on the planet, successful across the globe from Japanese snow monkeys to African baboons. Swinging through our family tree quickly reveals the diversity of our monkey relatives. They come in all shapes and sizes, and are certainly not as different from us as we might think.

programme.title: Lions On The Move
programme.desc: Kevin Richardson shares an extraordinary bond with Africa's most fearsome predators. Together with them, he has experienced some real adventures. However, transporting 27 lions and 14 hyenas to a new home presents a different challenge.

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Snow Leopard is the one of the most elusive big cats in the world. This episode details how the wildlife guards and the wildlife department has set up conservation and scientific plans to protect and indeed to enumerate and increase it's population

programme.title: Heroes Of The Wild Frontiers
programme.desc: Rhino horn is very expensive in the illegal market and the poachers know it. Kaziranga has the only concentrated population of the one horned Rhino in the world. And poachers are attracted to Kaziranga like ants are to sugar.

programme.title: Ocean's Africa
programme.desc: In 'Dinosaurs Of The Deep' we accompany a team of WildOceans' scientists uncovering the mysteries behind the deep oceans. With only 32 individuals known to exist off the coast of South Africa, central to the storytelling will be the quest to discover the 33rd coelacanth.

programme.title: Fertile Floods
programme.desc: Every year, in the middle of Croatia, it's the same story: after the annual snowmelt, a huge flood wave spills out of the Alps toward Zagreb and Belgrade. This leads to an increase in the River Sava's water levels of some ten metres. The contents of more than ten billion bathtubs floods an area the size of Lake Constance, often for months on end, yet still the Croatian and Serbian capital is spared a flood disaster. One of the reasons for this is the fact that the Sava is able to flow unhindered. The annual floods not only create a natural retention reservoir for flood control: alongside the Sava lies a natural paradise, unique in Central Europe. In the species-rich, alluvial flood forests of the last major meadow landscapes of the continent, enormous predatory fish like the catfish lie in wait for prey. The fertile floodplains of the Sava are an important resting place for more than 240 bird species, including Hoopoe, great crested Grebe, little Egret, common snipe and pied Avocet. Old, domestic livestock breeds like the Turopolje pig and Posavina horse spend almost the entire year in the floodplains. They appreciate the alluvial meadows, keep puddles and mudholes open whilst wallowing and, as living lawnmowers, they ensure that the moist meadows aren't transformed into dense oak forests. Thanks to this traditional pasture farming, more than 700 pairs of white stork alone breed in the Lonjsko Polje National Park. The Sava Floodplains allow us to glance into the past of our continent and at the same time, illustrate just how flood protection for major towns can be perfected.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean.

programme.title: Fair Trade
programme.sub-title: Cocoa From Ivory Coast (On the Road With Hannes Jaenicke)
programme.desc: Many everyday life goods get to us from all over the world. Even though they have crossed thousands of miles, their prices are shockingly low. On almost every occasion, this counts in to the disadvantage of the producers. While global players make gigantic profits, the farmers stay poor. Meanwhile, an alternative to this scenario does exist: Goods and products derived from fair trade. In Germany, labels like FAIRTRADE, GEPA, STEP or NATURLAND FAIR make the promise of trading while being aware of both sides of the production line. But can we really change things by our personal shopping tendencies only? Do we as consumers hold the power to change consume for the better? The actor and author of bestseller books Hannes Jaenicke makes it his goal to find out exactly about these questions. In a journey around the globe, he visits various small famers and producers who sell their products via fair trade. They show him how they live and work. What kind of people are they? And what has changed for them by getting organized in fair trade unions?

programme.title: Magical Moors
programme.desc: Wide open heaths, windswept and barren in winter, are transformed into wonderful carpets of white, fluffy cotton grass in summer. Large bears and wolves roam alongside delicately fluttering butterflies, the bubbling calls of black grouse and the enchanting trills of the great snipe. Moors, bogs and wetlands can be found all over in Europe. Everyone has at least heard about this habitat but most know little about it. It is an ancient yet largely unknown set of landscapes that is full of enchanting surprises. On a warm spring day, poisonous adders emerge from hiding to perform their impressive mating dance. As dusk falls, snipe gather on traditional leks, leaping and singing to impress the opposite sex. And deep down in the boggy marshes, glittering emeralds of sticky dew lure insects into the deadly arms of meat-eating plants. Magical Moors captures the quiet beauty of a spectacular landscape, and its often elusive wildlife, in stunning detail.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: From Generation to Generation
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: Sow, Harvest, Eat – Our Conservatory
programme.desc: This episode focuses on people from five countries who share a common passion: The production of their own food and food. What culinary treasures are hidden in the different regions, from Spitsbergen to Sweden, Austria, Poland and Chad?
